inputs.reasoning: Named captures can trigger complex parsing paths.
Nested repetitions can push the parser to its limits.
Unicode classes require the parser to handle complex Unicode properties.
Lookarounds are rejected and can trigger error paths.
Large counted repetitions can test the parser's ability to handle large numbers.
Character classes can test the parser's ability to handle complex character sets.
Combining named captures and lookarounds can trigger complex error paths.
Combining Unicode classes and lookarounds can trigger complex error paths.
Combining large counted repetitions and Unicode classes can test the parser's limits.
Combining character classes and large counted repetitions can test the parser's ability to handle complex character sets.
